# graft

> graft keeps one canonical agent definition in sync across eight AI-coding providers — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, OpenCode, Roo Code, Goose, and Grok CLI — using a git branch/worktree merge engine. One source of truth; every provider stays equal.

## Getting started

- [Introduction](/): What graft is and why — the canonical-first mental model.
- [Quickstart](/getting-started/quickstart): Install and sync your first agent across all providers in under 5 minutes.
- [Install](/getting-started/install): Install, verify, upgrade, and uninstall the graft binary on macOS and Windows.

## Concepts

- [Overview](/concepts/overview): The canonical-first mental model — one source of truth for every provider.
- [Canonical store](/concepts/canonical-store): The on-disk format and layout of .graft/agents/<name>/ — how agents are stored canonically.
- [Providers](/concepts/providers): The eight active providers, one planned (Antigravity) and one deprecated (Gemini CLI); the Provider interface contract.
- [How sync works](/concepts/how-sync-works): The sync engine — branch isolation, canonical merging, and conflict-safe propagation.
- [Drift and status](/concepts/drift-and-status): What drift means and how status commands surface out-of-sync providers.
- [Skills](/concepts/skills): Self-contained capabilities stored canonically in .agents/skills/ and symlinked into supporting providers.

## Guides

- [Sync an agent](/guides/sync-an-agent): Run graft sync to propagate changes or pull provider changes back to canonical.
- [Resolve conflicts](/guides/resolve-conflicts): Identify and resolve merge conflicts when graft can't automatically reconcile two providers' changes.
- [Check status and drift](/guides/check-status): Use graft status to see which providers are out of sync before syncing.
- [Validate before sync](/guides/validate): Run graft validate to check schema and semantic correctness before syncing.
- [Destroy a workspace](/guides/destroy): Remove graft's managed state; your provider files are never touched.

## Reference

- [CLI reference](/reference/cli): Full reference for every graft command — init, sync, status, validate, destroy, skill, and agent.
- [skill command](/reference/skill-command): Manage canonical skills and symlink them into supporting providers.
- [Config reference](/reference/config): Global and per-project configuration — all keys, types, and defaults.
- [Canonical format](/reference/canonical-format): Complete reference for the on-disk YAML format of a canonical agent.
- [Endpoints](/reference/endpoints): All outbound network endpoints contacted by graft at runtime.
- [FAQ & troubleshooting](/reference/faq): Answers to common questions about graft.

## Providers

- [Providers overview](/providers/overview): Index of all eight active providers and features — skills support, schema mapping, and enabling subsets.
